factors.summary: Demand trends are mixed across different segments.

factors.summary: Pricing power is present in some segments but not uniformly across all.

evidence.text: The gross margin percentage increased primarily due to higher segment gross margin in Aerospace and PMT.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Higher gross margins in some segments suggest pricing power is present, contributing positively.

factors.summary: Revenue mix is shifting towards higher-margin segments.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Shifting revenue mix towards higher-margin segments indicates a positive business development.
